content:
🚀 WE ARE HIRING | CA ARTICLE TRAINEES & CS TRAINEES
✨ Build your career with Mehra Goel & Co. LLP, a trusted Chartered Accountants firm since 1963.
Where Indian values & ethics meet modern technology, world-class infrastructure and multidisciplinary professional excellence. Join a firm that gives you the right foundation for a successful career in Audit, Tax & Advisory.
📍 Current Openings
📌 Gurgaon: 10 CA Articles + 4 CS Trainees
 📌 Delhi: 10 CA Articles
 📌 Mumbai: 5 CA Articles
 📌 Pune: 5 CA Articles
 📌 Chandigarh: 5 CA Articles
✅ Multiple location preferences can be selected.
 ❌ No Work From Home
 ❌ No Transfer / Industrial Training
 ✅ Full Articleship tenure with the Firm is required.
📲 Scan the QR Code in the flyer to apply.
🙏 We request our friends, professional colleagues, faculty members and well-wishers to Like, Comment, Share & Tag deserving CA/CS students. Your one share could help shape someone's professional future.

comment: No WFH and no transfer/industrial training increases early commitment; candidates should factor audit peak-season load vs fixed location constraints, which often drives early attrition.
